scripts.tauri:build:mac:all: node scripts/update-tauri-config.js && sh -c 'export CMAKE_OSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=10.15; echo "🔨 Building for ARM64 (aarch64)..."; node scripts/tauri-cli.js build --target aarch64-apple-darwin && echo "" && echo "🔨 Building for Intel (x86_64)..." && node scripts/tauri-cli.js build --target x86_64-apple-darwin && echo "" && echo "✅ Dual-arch build complete" && echo "   ARM64: .cargo-target/aarch64-apple-darwin/release/bundle/" && echo "   Intel: .cargo-target/x86_64-apple-darwin/release/bundle/"' sh
scripts.tauri:build:mac:all:debug: node scripts/update-tauri-config.js && sh -c 'export CMAKE_OSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=10.15; echo "🔨 Building DEBUG for ARM64 (aarch64)..."; node scripts/tauri-cli.js build --debug --target aarch64-apple-darwin && echo "" && echo "🔨 Building DEBUG for Intel (x86_64)..." && node scripts/tauri-cli.js build --debug --target x86_64-apple-darwin && echo "" && echo "✅ Dual-arch DEBUG build complete" && echo "   ARM64: .cargo-target/aarch64-apple-darwin/debug/bundle/" && echo "   Intel: .cargo-target/x86_64-apple-darwin/debug/bundle/"' sh
scripts.tauri:build:win: node scripts/update-tauri-config.js && node scripts/tauri-cli.js build --bundles nsis -- --no-default-features
scripts.ios:build: xcodebuild -project apps/ios/AMUX.xcodeproj -scheme AMUX -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath apps/ios/build build
scripts.ios:test: xcodebuild test -project apps/ios/AMUX.xcodeproj -scheme AMUXUITests -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro' -derivedDataPath apps/ios/build
scripts.test:e2e:legacy: vitest run --config vitest.config.e2e.ts tests/e2e tests/functional tests/regression
